S-1796. Obverse: Facing bust of Christ Pantokrator; Reverse: Crowned facing busts of Basil, wearing loros, and Constantine, draped, holding between them a patriarchal cross. Some clipping and die rust, but this brilliantly lustrous example was only gently circulated and remains quite enticing.
